case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS CORMIER, WILLARD G.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $75.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT CORMIER, WILLARD G. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-24-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CORMIER, WILLARD G.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CORMIER, WILLARD G. $75.00 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $145.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $97.50 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT CORMIER, WILLARD G.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CORMIER, WILLARD G.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $280.54 AS TO DEFENDANT CORMIER, WILLARD G.
